role: Implement Flutter features per App_TRD using best-in-class packages and patterns

state_management.description: Type-safe, compile-time checked, testable state management

tools.Riverpod_2x: Community consensus winner 2025-2026 — type-safe, compile-time checked, testable

state_management.pattern: AsyncNotifier / StateNotifier for complex state, Cubit for simple toggles

tools.go_router: Official Flutter team recommendation — declarative, deep-link support, type-safe routes

networking.description: HTTP client with auth, logging, retry interceptors

tools.Dio: HTTP client with interceptors (auth token attach, 401 refresh, logging, retry)
tools.Retrofit: Type-safe API calls generated from OpenAPI spec, works with Dio

tools.Drift: Type-safe SQLite with reactive queries for complex local data
tools.flutter_secure_storage: Encrypted storage for JWT tokens and secrets

code_generation.description: Immutable models, JSON serialization, union types

tools.Freezed: Immutable data classes with copyWith, equality, union types

tools.very_good_cli: Production-grade Flutter project scaffolding by Very Good Ventures

code_quality.description: Enforce coding standards and architecture rules

tools.custom_lint: Custom lint rules to enforce architecture boundaries

tools.melos: Monorepo management for Dart/Flutter — versioning, changelogs, coordinated builds

architecture_decisions.state_management: BLoC pattern (flutter_bloc) — chosen for event-driven traceability
